source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in <image>, the \(n:1\) step-down transformer and the diodes are ideal. The diodes have no voltage drop in forward biased condition. If the input voltage (in Volts) is \( V_s(t) = 10 \sin \omega t \) and the average value of load voltage \( V_L(t) \) (in Volts) is \( 2.5/\pi \), the value of \( n \) is _____
